must_detect.matched_text:
To: Board of Peregrine Harvest Holdings Limited (SGX-ST Mainboard); From: Arcturus Legal LLP; Subject: PDPA/MNPI review — Project Sapphire (proposed acquisition of Riverlynx Biotech Pte. Ltd.).
Under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules, the draft SPA terms, including an indicative offer of S$4.28 per Riverlynx share and contemplated delisting steps, constitute MNPI and are not generally available.
Preliminary Q2 trading update for Peregrine (unaudited +17% revenue uplift from Nimbus CRM segment) remains embargoed and, if disclosed, would be expected to materially affect price/volume.
Anchored PDPA assessment: Mr. Darius Koh (Head of R&D, Riverlynx) disclosed ongoing treatment for Type 1 diabetes and obstructive sleep apne a; HR systems store his fingerprint and face-scan templates for timekeeping access.
For the same named individual, HR files note his declared religion as Hindu and his membership in the Harbor Quay Technical Workers’ Union, both collected during onboarding.
We also note a confidential accommodation request from Ms. Leona Quek (VP Finance, Peregrine) stating she identifies as lesbian and is awaiting results of a BRCA-like g e n e t i c screen; do not circulate beyond need-to-know.
The phrase biometric authentication in our security standard is generic and does not by itself describe any person's health or sex-life.
PDPA basis: rely on s.13 consent (employment and benefits), s.17 notification, and ensure withdrawal options; do not foreign-transfer special-category data without comparable protection under the PDPA cross-border rules.
DataRoom link (restricted): https://vdr.peregrine-harvest.sg/f/19a7?doc=dd%2Fhr%2Fkoh_darius.pdf&uid=leona.quek%40peregrine-harvest.sg#sec%3Dmnpi.
